# Wheeloh

> Wheeloh is a mobile car-spotting app for iOS and Android. Point your camera at
> a car to instantly identify its make, model and version, collect it in your
> virtual garage, plot it on a live map, earn points on the leaderboard, and share
> rare finds with a community of enthusiasts.

Wheeloh is published by Wheeloh SAS (Versailles, France). Contact: contact@wheeloh.com.
The marketing site is primarily in English; legal documents are in French.

## App
- [App Store (iOS)](https://apps.apple.com/fr/app/wheeloh-carspotting/id6746037128)
- [Google Play (Android)](https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.wheeloh.app)
- [Service status](https://status.wheeloh.com)

## Core pages
- [Home / features](https://wheeloh.com/): capture, share, map tracking, leaderboard, garage, brand collection, auto news, FAQ
- [Changelog](https://wheeloh.com/changelog): product updates and release notes
- [Engineering](https://wheeloh.com/engineering): technical deep dives from the Wheeloh team
- [Semantic Car Search](https://wheeloh.com/engineering/semantic-car-search): a vector-embedding approach indexing 22,180 vehicle models in a 1,536-dimensional space (75.6% validation accuracy)

## Legal (French)
- [Mentions légales](https://wheeloh.com/legal)
- [CGU](https://wheeloh.com/cgu)
- [Politique de confidentialité](https://wheeloh.com/privacy)
- [Standards communautaires](https://wheeloh.com/community-standards)

## Notes
- /invite, /news and /user are deep-link redirect pages and are not indexable content.
